content: 能期待一手吗？
从我个人而言，买128是为了每日三倍，现在缩减一半，那不就是我花一样的钱少拿一半东西，没有任何说法吗?
什么东西缩减一半？
他那个每日试训是你每天登陆都有的啊，并不会因为你大月卡升级速度变快了，就少拿
这次大月卡是小版本的，时间只有正常大月卡的一半，对于氪128的玩家来说亏损了两周的3倍每日实训奖励（每日任务获得的普抽/银芯/守密人经验）
大月卡有个东西是每日奖励三倍，普通玩家每天是1抽，1个开立绘的那玩意，500经验，开大月卡会乘三，而这次版本只有十五天，比以往少一半，那么每日奖励也就少一半
请问是看不见还是故意不回应?明明同时间发的贴都有回，还是你们忙着舔洋人?
抱歉，帖子看到了计划先反馈完bug再跟进的，所以就没有先处理

content:
normally premium bp is 600 silver prime for 28 days of triple daily rewards, which comes to:
56 standard pulls + 4140 silver total (including the purchase bonus)

this premium bp is 600 silver prime for 14 days of triple daily rewards, which comes to:
28 standard pulls + 2460 silver total (including the purchase bonus)

so they removed almost half the value
Yes. I decided not to purchase premium BP this time unless they fix it.
<@1131790839291596841> this is a valid complaint
💭「Processing」Curiculum(Battle Pass) Premium rewards suggestion
I think they fixed it in an announcement ? Idk the new value compared to 28 days, but they lowered it apparently
yeah, they cut the price of it, and future ones like that

So we get compensation back when we buy it now for 1280? <@1131790839291596841> thr wording implies it but since the price for this curriculum wasn't adjusted after the patch I am not sure if you meant that only for the next shortened season pass. So I expect it for this season pass because of the wording.

💭「Processing」Faros "Homesick" shield scaling talent doesn't benefit from her Soulforge
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Faros "Homesick" shield scaling talent doesn't benefit from her Soulforge

content:
Soulforge effects do not influence your own Amplification. This increase applies to your team's damage Amplification.
All talent effects are only affected by your own wheel and Covenant attributes outside of combat, while Umbral Flight is a skill that actively reads in real-time.
Going forward, we will optimize the descriptions to make these clearer and more understandable.
